result.stdout:
Description:
  uml4net Tools

Usage:
  uml4net.Tools [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  excel-report  Generates a tabular report of the UML model
  inspect       Inspects an UML model and generates a text report
  html-report   Generates a html report of the UML model
  md-report     Generates a Markdown report of the UML model

commands.payload:
Description:
  uml4net Tools

Usage:
  uml4net.Tools [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  excel-report  Generates a tabular report of the UML model
  inspect       Inspects an UML model and generates a text report
  html-report   Generates a html report of the UML model
  md-report     Generates a Markdown report of the UML model

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates a tabular report of the UML model

Usage:
  uml4net.Tools excel-report [options]

Options:
  --no-logo                                                    Suppress the logo
  --log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Sets the logging level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]
  -i, --input-model <input-model> (REQUIRED)                   The path to the UML XMI file [default: model.xmi]
  -m, --pathmaps <pathmaps>                                    Add pathmap key-value pairs
  -a, --auto-open-report (REQUIRED)                            Open the generated report with its default application
  -s, --use-strict-reading                                     When Strict Reading is set to true the reader will throw an exception if it encounters an unknown element or attribute. Otherwise, it will ignore the unknown element or attribute and log a warning.
  -rmi, --root-package-xmi-id <root-package-xmi-id>            The unique identifier of the of the root package to report on
  -rn, --root-package-name <root-package-name>                 The name of the of the root package to report on
  -o, --output-report <output-report> (REQUIRED)               The path to the tabular report file. Supported extensions are '.xlsx', '.xlsm', '.xltx' and '.xltm' [default: tabular-report.xlsx]
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information

  -rmi, --root-package-xmi-id <root-package-xmi-id>            The unique identifier of the of the root package to report on

result.stdout:
Description:
  Inspects an UML model and generates a text report

Usage:
  uml4net.Tools inspect [options]

Options:
  --no-logo                                                    Suppress the logo
  --log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Sets the logging level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]
  -i, --input-model <input-model> (REQUIRED)                   The path to the UML XMI file [default: model.xmi]
  -m, --pathmaps <pathmaps>                                    Add pathmap key-value pairs
  -a, --auto-open-report (REQUIRED)                            Open the generated report with its default application
  -s, --use-strict-reading                                     When Strict Reading is set to true the reader will throw an exception if it encounters an unknown element or attribute. Otherwise, it will ignore the unknown element or attribute and log a warning.
  -rmi, --root-package-xmi-id <root-package-xmi-id>            The unique identifier of the of the root package to report on
  -rn, --root-package-name <root-package-name>                 The name of the of the root package to report on
  -o, --output-report <output-report> (REQUIRED)               The path to the text report file. Supported extensions is '.txt' [default: inspection-report.txt]
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates a Markdown report of the UML model

Usage:
  uml4net.Tools md-report [options]

Options:
  --no-logo                                                    Suppress the logo
  --log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Sets the logging level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]
  -i, --input-model <input-model> (REQUIRED)                   The path to the UML XMI file [default: model.xmi]
  -m, --pathmaps <pathmaps>                                    Add pathmap key-value pairs
  -a, --auto-open-report (REQUIRED)                            Open the generated report with its default application
  -s, --use-strict-reading                                     When Strict Reading is set to true the reader will throw an exception if it encounters an unknown element or attribute. Otherwise, it will ignore the unknown element or attribute and log a warning.
  -rmi, --root-package-xmi-id <root-package-xmi-id>            The unique identifier of the of the root package to report on
  -rn, --root-package-name <root-package-name>                 The name of the of the root package to report on
  -o, --output-report <output-report> (REQUIRED)               The path to the markdown report file. Supported extensions are '.md' [default: md-report.md]
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information
